Readiness trigger with surface validation. DLL identity checker. Session mode (Runner/Human). Unique launch IDs. Auto-unpause service. Escape menu helper via Win32 keybd_event. v1.4.7 compatibility with Steam API fixture. LaunchForgeContinue.cmd 5-phase pipeline with crash guards at every step.
